testcase.name: Register, Login and Place Order for Computer
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the Demo Web Shop home page................................passed When User navigates to registration page....................................passed And User registers with new credentials.....................................passed Then User should see registration success message...........................passed When User logs out..........................................................passed And User logs in with registered credentials................................passed Then User should be logged in successfully..................................passed When User navigates to Computers category...................................passed And User selects Building Computers.........................................passed And User adds a computer to cart............................................passed Then User should see item added to cart.....................................passed When User proceeds to checkout..............................................passed And User fills billing and shipping information.............................passed And User places the order...................................................passed Then User should see order confirmation.....................................passed
